nasb.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts, ‘It will yet be that peoples will come, even the inhabitants of many cities.

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts: Peoples shall yet come, even the inhabitants of many cities.

cnv.text: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘將來還有萬族的人和多個城市的居民要來。

ccb.text: 各族的人和各城的居民都必来这里。这是万军之耶和华说的。
